description: LAX Terminal B — domestic terminal with solid quick-serve and sit-down options.

vendors.name: Umami Burger
vendors.opinion: LA staple. Worth the walk if you have 25+ minutes.

vendors.name: Lemonade
vendors.opinion: Quick, fresh, and actually good. My go-to when I'm short on time.

tips: Terminal B is compact. Lemonade is your best bet for speed and quality. Avoid the generic coffee kiosks — there's a decent Starbucks near gate 25.
